flow-definition.description: Laser CI integration tests triggered from GitLab

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: GITLAB_ARTIFACT_URL
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: GitLab API URL to download the artifacts zip

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: TRIGGERED_BY
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Component that triggered the pipeline (lasergun | lasershark | laserwhale | brain_implant)

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: GITLAB_COMMIT_SHA
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Git commit SHA that triggered this build

hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.name: GITLAB_BRANCH
hudson.model.StringParameterDefinition.description: Git branch that triggered this build
